qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of CSE?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Computer Science and Engineering (CSE): Dr. D. Sivaganesan.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Computer Science and Engineering?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Computer Science and Engineering (CSE): Dr. D. Sivaganesan.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of CSE – AI & ML?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Computer Science and Engineering – AI & ML: Dr. P. Vivekanandan.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of CSE – Cyber Security?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Computer Science and Engineering – Cyber Security: Dr. K.N. Vijeyakumar.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AIDS)?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Artificial Intelligence and Data Science (AIDS): Dr. N. Suba Rani.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of ECE?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Electronics and Communication Engineering (ECE): Dr. V.K. Sudha.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Electronics Engineering – VLSI Design and Technology?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Electronics Engineering – VLSI Design and Technology: Dr. N. Saravanakumar.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Electronics Communication – Advanced Communication Technology?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Electronics Communication – Advanced Communication Technology: Dr. V.K. Sudha.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE)?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Electrical and Electronics Engineering (EEE): Dr. K. Vijayakumar.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Mechanical Engineering?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Mechanical Engineering: Dr. Rama Thirumurugan.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Civil Engineering?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Civil Engineering: Dr. P. S. Kothai.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Automobile Engineering?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Automobile Engineering: Dr. D. Shanmugam.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Information Technology (IT)?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Information Technology (IT): Dr. L. Meenachi.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Computer Applications (MCA)?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Computer Applications (MCA): Dr. R. Muthusami.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the HOD of Science and Humanities?
qa_pairs.answer: Head of the Department, Science and Humanities: Dr. L. Chitra.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the Principal of MCET?
qa_pairs.answer: Principal and Joint Secretary: Dr. P. Govindasamy, B.E., M.E., Ph.D. 30+ years of teaching, research, and administration experience.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the Correspondent of MCET?
qa_pairs.answer: Correspondent: Shri. M. Hari Hara Sudhan, B.E., MS (since November 2012).

qa_pairs.question: Who is the Secretary of MCET?
qa_pairs.answer: Secretary of NIA Institutions: Dr. S.V. Subramanian, MBA, Ph.D. 25+ years in HR and Administration.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the Vice Principal of MCET?
qa_pairs.answer: Vice Principal: Dr. A. Senthil Kumar, B.E., M.E., Ph.D. Vice Principal for 11 years.

qa_pairs.question: Who is the Dean of Research & Innovation?
qa_pairs.answer: Dean – Research & Innovation: Dr. S. Ramakrishnan, B.E., M.E., Ph.D. Registered Indian Patent Agent (IN/PA 6069).

qa_pairs.question: Who is the founder chairman of MCET?
qa_pairs.answer: Founder Chairman: Arutchelvar Dr. N. Mahalingam (21 March 1923 – 2 October 2014).

qa_pairs.question: Who is the current chairman of MCET?
qa_pairs.answer: Current Chairman: Dr. M. Manickam, M.Sc., MBA. Graduated from University of Michigan.

qa_pairs.question: When was MCET established?
qa_pairs.answer: MCET was established in 1998 to commemorate the 75th birthday of Arutchelvar Dr. N. Mahalingam.

qa_pairs.question: What is the fee for lateral entry IT?
qa_pairs.answer: Lateral entry B.Tech in Information Technology at MCET costs approximately Rs.1.5 lakh total for the 3-year program.

qa_pairs.question: What is the eligibility for lateral entry admission at MCET?
qa_pairs.answer: Eligibility for lateral entry admission at MCET requires a Diploma in Engineering, or a B.Sc. with Mathematics as a subject.
